feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Hello. I really like playing garage bad dream adventure. Can you please recommen…

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >What if we took a forgotten comic/cartoon IP and made a beat em up out of it? W…
entry.content: >What if we took a forgotten comic/cartoon IP and made a beat em up out of it? Why has this become so common lately? Is it just a reflex from this being a common format from the 80s and 90s if the game wasn't a platformer? Stuff like Marvel Cosmic Invasion or the TMNT ones have precedent but they just put out one for the fucking Phantom. For all I know there's some fucking public domain beat em up being made starring Stardust the Super Wizard, Joe Palooka and Miss Fury.

entry.content: How long, Lord? Will you forget me forever? How long will you hide your face from me? How long must I wrestle with my thoughts and day after day have sorrow in my heart? How long will my enemy triumph over me?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Marathon is a good game but i totally understand why so many dropped it
entry.content: >Begin as solo >Have a fantastic time as a stealth shooter like Halo Reach, Metal Gear and Sir you are being hunter in a blender >Every action is "fuck did i make too much noise" every noise is "fuck is that another guy creeping around?" >Try Rook and its alright as a side thing >Overall the game looks great, runs great, sounds fantastic and the shooting feels better than Destiny by a country mile >Time to try trios with randos NARRATOR: It was in this moment he fucked up. >Everyone is the most

entry.content: >/tv/ kept raving about Andor >"We're so back" they said >"SW is returning to its roots." they claimed >Look inside >Identity politics >Israel/Palestine allegory >Every oppressor is white and male >Every rapist is white and male >Every heroic character is either brown or black What the fuck did you anons even mean when you said that this was the comeback we've been waiting for. This is the exact same idpol shit we've been fed for the last 10 years, only drip-fed slowly over the course of two sea

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >Hello saar very butiful new google earth update for u??? Kalars are wery wibran…
entry.content: >Hello saar very butiful new google earth update for u??? Kalars are wery wibrant just like bharat flag and high resolution artificial intelligence upscale wery shaarp HDR imagery saar. When is enough enough? I'm willing to put up with a lot, but this is going too far. Why is some retard with a name like Prabhakar Raghavan allowed to take a giant shit all over something as significant as Google Earth? Where is the oversight?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /wdg/ - Web Development General
entry.content: Hosting edition. >Free beginner resources to get started with HTML, CSS and JS https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US /docs/Learn - MDN is your best friend for fundamentals https://web.dev/learn/ - Guides by Google, you can also learn concepts like Accessibility, Responsive Design etc https://eloquentjavascript.net/Eloq uent_JavaScript.pdf - A modern introduction to JavaScript https://javascript.info/ - Quite a good JS tutorial https://flukeout.github.io/ - Learn CSS selectors in no time https://fl

entry.content: /fgds/ - Fat Gardens: Fat Plants, Bugs, and Snakes General Honey edition Previous Threads: https://desuarchive.org/trash/searc h/text/Fat%20gardens/ We’ve married fatbug and fatgarden into one realized fat general and added snakes, arachnids, and fungi among other fatties. This thread exists for the sole purpose of answering one question. QotT: HOW THE FUCK DO YOU MASTURBATE WITH FOOD?! Thread theme(s): https://youtu.be/vPzfKe_G4Ng Thread template (as of 15 Oct 2023): https://desuarchive.org/tra

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /fglt/ - Friendly GNU/Linux Thread
entry.content: Users of all levels are welcome to ask questions about GNU/Linux and share their experiences. *** Please be civil — notice the "Friendly" in every Friendly GNU/Linux Thread. *** Before asking for help, please check our list of resources. >Which distro should I choose? https://nosystemd.org >What are some cool programs? https://suckless.org >What are some cool terminal commands? https://cheat.sh >Where can I learn the command line? RTFM >Where can I learn more about Free Software? https://stallma

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Have you guys tried writing a poem? It's easy, you can write a quantrain with 4 …
entry.content: Have you guys tried writing a poem? It's easy, you can write a quantrain with 4 lines, or a haiku with three lines. >Roses are red >Buries are Blue >Poop is brown >And sometimes you too! You can use octosyllabic meter or pentasyllabic meter. >When I do poop on set of the muddy vines >And my stool does mention my storied rhyme Your fortune: Bad Luck

entry.content: /adhg/ Anthro Females Dominating Human Males General #1175 >”Just Hangin Out" edition This is a general dedicated to non-human female anthros (furries) dominating human men. entry.title: /news/ News: 'We're modern people' — Zelensky backs open discussion of LGBTQ+ rights in Ukraine
entry.content: There should be open public discussion about the rights of the LGBTQ+ community in Ukraine, President Volodymyr Zelensky said on June 11, in a rare reference to the topic. Zelensky's comment came during a cultural event in Kyiv, as legislative efforts to advance LGBTQ+ rights in Ukraine continue to face slow progress, despite growing public support in recent years. Oleksandr Demenko, a veteran and head of an LGBTQ+ military and veterans NGO asked the president whether Ukraine needs cultural prod

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8377 Unrelated Lust Provoking Image Edition Previous Thr…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8377 Unrelated Lust Provoking Image Edition Previous Thread: >>83428655 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and adv

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /fvn/ - Furry Visual Novels
entry.content: I do edition Talk about all things FVN here: Gay, straight, bara, twink, femboy, Western, Japanese, human MC, anthro MC - you name it. >Pastebin https://rentry.org/furryvn >What is this pastebin? This pastebin serves as a hub for compiling FVNs that we think are worth playing (or at least worth keeping an eye on) into lists. >Who can contribute to the pastebin? Anyone! >Looking for something new or want to see what projects are out there? https://fvn.li/ Last thread: https://desuarchive.org/tras

entry.title: /b/ Random: a couple years ago, my mom put me in a group home, i lived there for 7 months...…
entry.content: a couple years ago, my mom put me in a group home, i lived there for 7 months...holy fucking shit, living there was the absolute rock bottom of my whole life, it was awful...the food sucked, my room was always cold as shit, they made me take medications i didn't want to take, we sometimes went on these really terrible "outings" in the community that were boring, my roommates were fuck heads...it was just a really bad experience, and i'm glad it's over.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >AI IS DESTROYING THE WORLD'S WATER, DOWNLOAD ECOGPT TO PLANT A TREE! Daughter, …
entry.content: >AI IS DESTROYING THE WORLD'S WATER, DOWNLOAD ECOGPT TO PLANT A TREE! Daughter, water scarcity has existed since 1900. Besides, if I use ecogpt I have to pay $20 a month to feel good about using Deepseek, thinking it's "eco-friendly." I'd rather go to Wendy's and get a hamburger. Who's coming with me?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Been stuck finding a good first car with around a 11-12k budget. All of the opti…
entry.content: Been stuck finding a good first car with around a 11-12k budget. All of the options are ass, and the good picks are overpriced for their year and mileage. I’d like something with good handling and decently reliable, and the Mazda3 I heard is pretty good for what I want, but I figured I’d defer to you guys since you know cars 10000x better than I do. I also still don’t know how to drive stick, so that definitely makes it harder.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Play the classics
entry.content: >see new game >search "[new game] inspirations" >search further inspirations from its spiritual parents if interested >pick something from all that >acquire enjoyment from a well regarded product >gain culture by knowing an influential work If you still want to play the newer game, you gain higher appreciation of it by identifying what it drinks from.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Where do I go if I'm not well-listened in black metal but really like Minenwerfe…
entry.content: Where do I go if I'm not well-listened in black metal but really like Minenwerfer? Not specifically the war theme or whatever, just the atmospheric post-rock nature of their black metal. It is quite spacey and neither annoyingly lowfi or over produced.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Sage
entry.content: Okay I’m from the south (USA) and I need to explain something to people. In and around cities and suburbs there is a lot of fake performative “country” people all over. These people are essentially no different from city slickers but they drive a lifted truck and wear cowboy hats. They have nothing in common with actual county folk. The fake country people are like a TikTok meme that got out of hand Masculinity is not something that can be sold to you by jews but these faggots never got the memo

entry.content: We got a new priest He gives a good sermon but he is incredibly slow. He is so slow that half of the congregation was out the door before he could finish stepping down from the alter. He is so slow, that the organist and singer stopped himself halfway through the first verse of the final song, because he realized the priest didnt say his closing words, and he wound up having to wait, and start over from the beginning.
